title: DeWALT 254mm 2000W Corded Table Saw DWE7491-XE $599 @ Bunnings Warehouse
body:
Deal: DeWALT 254mm 2000W Corded Table Saw DWE7491-XE $599 @ Bunnings Warehouse

[poiterbad] Also showing $999 in SA. If you can get it at this discounted price, it's a great table saw imo.
[mrbearski] Melbourne only same as that drop saw deal
[sunnymel] I don’t need it but I tried opening the link in incognito mode and didn’t allow the location services. Changed to click and collect and selected Keppera store, price didn’t change. I didn’t complete the payment so can’t say for sure if it will go through. If you need it maybe worth trying.
Also, don’t go back and forward on the pages. That will change the price.
[Averell] I tried but it didn't work.
Without location, it showed the low price, but then during check out, it asked to select a store. As soon as I tried to put Keppera in, the price jumped.
[Man10United] Yeah I saw one in the bunnings today. I bought one two years go on sale for $950 with stand just because it was on sale. Sad part is I used it only twice.
[subywagon] Amazing. It's on sale in Tassie. Normally we miss it. It's a great saw. I've used the sht out of it and rate it well.
[Schikitar] Which store you seeing that? It's $999 at North Launceston and Kings Meadows for me..
[subywagon] Oh crap, it's flicking to $999 now when I select stores… of course Tassie misses out again.
[HelloGood] Would you share which store? The difference would cover shipping Aus wide.
[Nillionaire] Nice find OP! Now let's try to work out the state availablity..
@salekhard says it's $990 in WA ❌
@poiterbad says it's $999 in SA ❌❓
@mrbearski says it's Melbourne only (VIC) ✅
@stuckster says it's $999 in NSW ❌
@ansible says it's $999 in QLD ❌
@Man10United says he saw in store today, profile location is VIC ✅
@subywagon says it's on sale in TAS ✅
@Billybob94111 says it's $495 in SA ✅❓
[subywagon] I was wrong, it's $999. The store wasn't selected…
[Cashy] Pakenham has stock at $599. Yet another road trip. Thanks OP.
[ssv0203] Is there a redemption offer that comes with this ?
[Cashy] Instore Bonus valued at $589
1 x DeWalt DCB184-XJ (DCB184-XE) 18V 5.0Ah XR Li-Ion Cordless Slide Battery
1 x DeWalt DCW210N-XJ 18V XR Li-ion Cordless Brushless 125mm (5") Random Orbital Sander - Skin Only
1 x DeWalt DCB1104-XE 12V-18V Multi-Voltage Battery Charger
There's no mention of the redemption on the product page, but when you search for the table saw on the bunnings site, the redemption offer is shown at the bottom of the image link.
[subywagon] Yeah, I noticed that too. It's not a leftover from a tax time deal or something?
[Cashy] On the Sydney Tools website for the table saw, the same bonus offer says 1st July - 31st August 2026
